author: mmusich
body:
#### PR description:

Title says it all. To make sure we don't accumulate more cases as the one included at https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/issues/47275. 

#### PR validation:

`scram b runtests_test_PluginConfigValidationCoverage` runs for both:
- `CMSSW_20_1_X_2026-06-23-1100` (succeeds)
- `CMSSW_20_1_X_2026-06-22-2300` (fails because it's missing https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/pull/51273)

when this commit is cherry-picked.

#### If this PR is a backport please specify the original PR and why you need to backport that PR. If this PR will be backported please specify to which release cycle the backport is meant for:

Not a backport, no backport needed.
title: add a test for coverage of configuration validation of plugins used at HLT
